name: The SPAR Group Limited

anchor.source: SP1 - SPAR audited results FY2025 (SENS 8 Dec 2025). H1 FY2026 actual continuing HEPS 199.9c, -55.5% (SP2, published 10 Jun 2026). net_finance_costs_rm is an analyst estimate (e).

rationale: Continuing HEPS is modelled directly off the two ACTUAL prints (FY2025 795.8c; H1 FY2026 199.9c) because SPAR's reported bridge carries large extraordinary/discontinued items. In every scenario FY2026 HEPS sits far below FY2025. Scenario A = de-gearing resumes (lower rates), fuel relief, consumer recovery + self-help (KZN/SAP/cost) lift margin and HEPS - a higher-beta recovery bet, not safety. Scenario B = higher rates stall de-gearing and lift the legacy ZAR-debt drag, fuel hits the distribution-heavy cost base and the wounded KZN DC, trade-down flows OUT of SPAR independents, dividend stays nil.
